title: Immunohistochemical classification of sensory and autonomic neurons projecting to the lower urinary tract in rats [keast-001]
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c0ri8","text":"This collection describes the procedures required to label, visualise, characterise and quantify neurons that innervate the lower urinary tract tissues of adult male and female Sprague-Dawley rats. This collection includes protocols for:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e0phm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47a19","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c2p4k","text":"STAGE 1: Surgery to micro-inject fluorescent retrograde tracer dyes into one or more sites within the lower urinary tract","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9ihkc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5j7iq","text":"STAGE 2: Intracardiac perfusion with fixative to preserve neural tissues of interest","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"rf8l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"af42f","text":"STAGE 3: Fluorescence immunohistochemistry of ganglion cryosections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
